chunks.text:
# PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

AI Engineer and Full-Stack Developer building agentic AI products, RAG systems, and production web apps using Next.js, FastAPI, LangChain, MCP, and LLM infrastructure. Focused on shipping real products end-to-end, from AI workflow design to frontend execution and deployment-ready systems.
chunks.heading: PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

chunks.text:
# EDUCATION

Bachelor of Technology (Computer Science) 2024 - 2028
Newton School Of Technology Grade: 8.2/10.0
Intermediate (Class XII) 2023 - 2024
Dayawati Dharmavira Public School , Bijnor Grade: 83.0%
chunks.heading: EDUCATION

chunks.text:
# EXPERIENCE

**AI Engineer Intern** March 2026 - May 2026
**AdvaitAI** Remote
• Shipped 4 AI products in a 2-month internship, including 2 client-facing products and 2 core company products.
• Built AI-powered web apps and automation workflows using Next.js, FastAPI, and LLM tooling, owning both frontend and backend execution.
• Implemented RAG pipelines, vector retrieval, and multi-agent workflows for contextual interactions and product automation.
• Designed authentication flows, reusable UI components, and deployment-ready product infrastructure for live client-facing systems.
chunks.heading: EXPERIENCE

chunks.text:
# Founder & President August 2025 - Present

**SAGE – Society of Advanced Gaming Esports**, Rishihood University Sonipat, Haryana
• Founded and led SAGE, a 51-member student esports organization, and organized Quantica’26, one of Delhi NCR’s biggest student-led inter-college esports festivals.
• Managed 17+ national brands and partners, secured Rs.6L+ in sponsorships, and coordinated Rs.43L+ worth of event logistics and infrastructure.
• Drove 2000+ participants, 1000+ outside-campus footfall, 11+ states represented, 25,000+ website views, and 2.5 lakh+ Instagram impressions.
chunks.heading: Founder & President August 2025 - Present

chunks.text:
# PROJECTS

**Daily Reasoning Platform** ( Github - https://github.com/Deepanshu-Nst/DailyMathsRiddle ) ( Demo -  https://riddle.advaita1.com/) April 2026
Tech: Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL, Groq API
• Built a full-stack AI learning product with streaks, leaderboards, XP systems, and adaptive challenge flows.
• Developed multi-agent riddle generation and validation pipelines with automated scheduling, moderation, and publishing workflows.
• Built admin dashboards, authentication, and AI-powered puzzle generation using Supabase, REST APIs, and Groq.

**Devasya AI – Agentic AI Platform** ( Github - https://github.com/Deepanshu-Nst/Devasya-AI) ( Demo - https://devasya-ai.vercel.app/) March 2026
Tech: Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, ChromaDB, LangChain, LangGraph, MCP
• Built an agentic AI workspace that combines ChatGPT-like conversational intelligence with Notion-like memory and note organization.
• Implemented semantic memory retrieval, MCP tool integration, and multi-agent execution to keep the system context-aware across sessions.
• Integrated resume analysis, GitHub review, job discovery, and web search into one cohesive AI workflow layer.

**Tournify – Event Management Platform** ( Github - https://github.com/Deepanshu-Nst/tournify) ( Demo - https://tournify-delta.vercel.app/) April 2025
Tech: Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, Prisma, Firebase, Express.js
• Developed a full-stack event platform with authentication, organizer dashboards, backend APIs, and responsive user flows.
• Built high-quality animated interfaces using Framer Motion, React Three Fiber, GSAP, and smooth-scrolling interactions.
• Implemented scalable backend systems with JWT auth, bcrypt password encryption, role-based access, and deployment via Vercel.
chunks.heading: PROJECTS

chunks.text:

**Cloud & DevOps**: Git and Github, Docker

**Domain & Business Skills**: UI/UX, Product Management

chunks.text:
# FitCheck
Built FitCheck as a full-stack fashion-tech mobile application inspired by real consumer styling workflows. Users can upload outfit images, receive AI-generated feedback, manage their profile and style preferences, and interact with a production-style mobile experience built using React Native, Node.js, TypeScript, Supabase, and AI APIs.
Language: TypeScript
Stars: 0
Topics: react-native, typescript, supabase, ai
chunks.heading: FitCheck
